dj_text: That was Suspekt - Proletar (Hvor Jeg Står). Changing the channel. Just kidding, there's only one channel. L.O.C. - Frk. Escobar.
commercial_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh. This is the quiet dimension. No talking. No music. Just...
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: Dimensional bleed. Happens sometimes. Never to US, but sometimes.
